attributes.title: logstash-*
attributes.name: Logs by tiago
attributes.runtimeFieldMap: {"correlation.origin":{"type":"keyword","script":{"source":"def appName = ''; if (doc.containsKey('application_name.keyword') && doc['application_name.keyword'].size() > 0) { appName = doc['application_name.keyword'].value; } if (appName.length() > 0) { def m = /^(exercises-[^;]+);req=([^;]+)(?:;(?:sid|s)=(.+))?$/.matcher(appName); if (m.find()) { emit(m.group(1)); } }"}},"correlation.request_id":{"type":"keyword","script":{"source":"def appName = ''; if (doc.containsKey('application_name.keyword') && doc['application_name.keyword'].size() > 0) { appName = doc['application_name.keyword'].value; } if (appName.length() > 0) { def m = /^(exercises-[^;]+);req=([^;]+)(?:;(?:sid|s)=(.+))?$/.matcher(appName); if (m.find()) { emit(m.group(2)); } }"}},"correlation.session_id":{"type":"keyword","script":{"source":"def appName = ''; if (doc.containsKey('application_name.keyword') && doc['application_name.keyword'].size() > 0) { appName = doc['application_name.keyword'].value; } if (appName.length() > 0) { def m = /^(exercises-[^;]+);req=([^;]+)(?:;(?:sid|s)=(.+))?$/.matcher(appName); if (m.find() && m.group(3) != null) { emit(m.group(3)); } }"}},"sql.op":{"type":"keyword","script":{"source":"if (doc.containsKey('ps.keyword') && doc['ps.keyword'].size() > 0) { def ps = doc['ps.keyword'].value.toUpperCase(); if (ps.equals('SELECT') || ps.equals('INSERT') || ps.equals('UPDATE') || ps.equals('DELETE')) { emit(ps); } } if (doc.containsKey('message.keyword') && doc['message.keyword'].size() > 0) { def m = /(?i)\\b(SELECT|INSERT|UPDATE|DELETE)\\b/.matcher(doc['message.keyword'].value); if (m.find()) { emit(m.group(1).toUpperCase()); } }"}},"url_params.name":{"type":"keyword","script":{"source":"if (doc.containsKey('url_param_name.keyword') && doc['url_param_name.keyword'].size() > 0) { emit(doc['url_param_name.keyword'].value); } else if (doc.containsKey('url_params.keyword') && doc['url_params.keyword'].size() > 0) { def raw = doc['url_params.keyword'].value; def key = '\"name\":\"'; def start = raw.indexOf(key); if (start >= 0) { def from = start + key.length(); def end = raw.indexOf('\"', from); if (end > from) { emit(raw.substring(from, end)); } } }"}},"url_params.email":{"type":"keyword","script":{"source":"if (doc.containsKey('url_param_email.keyword') && doc['url_param_email.keyword'].size() > 0) { emit(doc['url_param_email.keyword'].value); } else if (doc.containsKey('url_params.keyword') && doc['url_params.keyword'].size() > 0) { def raw = doc['url_params.keyword'].value; def key = '\"email\":\"'; def start = raw.indexOf(key); if (start >= 0) { def from = start + key.length(); def end = raw.indexOf('\"', from); if (end > from) { emit(raw.substring(from, end)); } } }"}},"log_body":{"type":"keyword","script":{"source":"if (doc.containsKey('body.keyword') && doc['body.keyword'].size() > 0) { def b = doc['body.keyword'].value; if (b.length() > 0 && !b.equals('{}')) { emit(b); } else if (doc.containsKey('message.keyword') && doc['message.keyword'].size() > 0) { emit(doc['message.keyword'].value); } } else if (doc.containsKey('message.keyword') && doc['message.keyword'].size() > 0) { emit(doc['message.keyword'].value); }"}},"session_id_resolved":{"type":"keyword","script":{"source":"def sid = null; if (doc.containsKey('session_id.keyword') && doc['session_id.keyword'].size() > 0) { sid = doc['session_id.keyword'].value; } if (sid == null && doc.containsKey('headers.keyword') && doc['headers.keyword'].size() > 0) { def h = doc['headers.keyword'].value; def xsKey = '\"x-session-id\":\"'; def xsStart = h.indexOf(xsKey); if (xsStart >= 0) { def from = xsStart + xsKey.length(); def end = h.indexOf('\"', from); if (end > from) { sid = h.substring(from, end); } } if (sid == null) { def ckKey = 'exercises_session='; def ckStart = h.indexOf(ckKey); if (ckStart >= 0) { def from = ckStart + ckKey.length(); def end = h.indexOf(';', from); sid = end > from ? h.substring(from, end) : h.substring(from); } } if (sid == null) { def baKey = '\"authorization\":\"Bearer '; def baStart = h.indexOf(baKey); if (baStart >= 0) { def from = baStart + baKey.length(); def end = h.indexOf('\"', from); if (end > from) { sid = h.substring(from, end); } } } } if (sid != null && sid.length() > 0) { emit(sid); }"}}}
